hero.title: Taste the Sea, Tradition on the Table
hero.subtitle: Enjoy the best Mediterranean cuisine in a cozy atmosphere. Fresh fish, selected seafood, and traditional rice dishes.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: The best flavors of the Mediterranean, selected for you.
menu.emptyTitle: The menu is not available at the moment.
menu.emptyDesc: Please check back later or ask our staff.
menu.thanksText: "To our parents, Eduardo and Alicia, who forged this dream in 1988, which we, their children, try to keep alive every day. Sit at the table, feel at home, let's uncork a good wine, and enjoy our precious legacy."

about.title: About Us
about.introDesc: With over 30 years of tradition, Mesón Marinero was born from a passion for the sea and authentic cuisine. Our story is that of a family dedicated to offering the best of our coasts in every dish, keeping old recipes alive.

aboutPage.title: Our History
aboutPage.subtitle: Tradition, sea, and passion since 1990.
aboutPage.section1P1: Mesón Marinero opened its doors for the first time in the summer of 1990. What began as a small corner for local fishermen soon became a benchmark for Alicante gastronomy thanks to the dedication of the Rodriguez family.
aboutPage.section1P2: Our cuisine is based on a fundamental pillar: absolute respect for the product. Every morning, we personally select the best fish and seafood from the fish market to ensure that only the freshest reaches your table.
aboutPage.val1Desc: We work exclusively with local suppliers and fish markets in the area.
aboutPage.val2Desc: Keeping traditional flavors alive is our reason for being.
aboutPage.val3Desc: For us, every customer is part of the Mesón family.
aboutPage.visitDesc: We are in the heart of the port of Alicante. We are waiting for you with the table set.
